findings.title: Doctor remediations still point project repair at setup
findings.rationale: The split makes `codex1 init` the preserved project-scoped repair path, but `doctor` still tells users to run `codex1 setup` for repo-local fixes such as missing hooks, AGENTS.md drift, and skill-surface repair. After this change, `setup` is only the global boundary stub, so those remediations now point users at the wrong command and will not repair the project surface they are diagnosing.
findings.suggested_next_action: Update doctor remediation text for project-scoped findings to instruct `codex1 init` instead of `codex1 setup`, while keeping `setup` guidance only for global machine-level repair once that implementation lands.
